text.title: cloud-run-deployment Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for cloud-run-deployment as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Hardcoding PORT=8080 in CMD or application config without reading from the PORT environment variable.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cloud Run injects PORT at runtime. If a future revision or environment sets a different port, the container silently fails to serve traffic.
